tasks.completion_summary: Phase 4 Yoga layout: new Strata.Layout.Yoga package (YogaLayoutPass maps computed style to a parallel Yoga tree per tech-design 4.1 and computes integer-cell rects), layout property descriptors, grid-as-flex emulation (native Yoga.Net 3.2.3 grid is non-functional - documented v1.1 fallback per plan risk), SpectreProjection layout overload (Grid for display:grid, absolute placement), multi-column dashboard demo. 155 tests green, clean net8.0;net10.0 build, AOT publish smoke passes.
